title: capsella drummondii
intro: Capsella drummondii, also known as Drummond's cress or bittercress, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to Western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant. The health benefits of Capsella drummondii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce menstrual cramps. Capsella drummondii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat a variety of ailments.
